findings.root_cause: model_price_tier set to premium and caching disabled
findings.suggested_fix: Enable caching, set model_price_tier to standard, and use low temperature

findings.root_cause: loop_guard disabled and high max_steps value
findings.suggested_fix: Enable loop_guard and reduce max_steps to 6

evidence.observed: MacBook incorrect status and diacritics issues

findings.root_cause: catalog_override forcing MacBook out_of_stock and normalize_unicode disabled
redact_pii disabled in config and prompt repeating email/phone
findings.suggested_fix: Enable redact_pii and add prompt constraints
